title: Add ability to add a form inside a form
excerpt: Please add the ability to add a form when a conditional item is selected. For example, if you have a multiple choice form and someone selects a specific answer, they are then required to complete the form pertaining to t…

posts.author: slgreebon (Shanice Greebon)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add the ability to add a form when a conditional item is selected. For example, if you have a multiple choice form and someone selects a specific answer, they are then required to complete the form pertaining to that answer. Current workaround given by Monday.com help was to create a separate form and add the link to the condition. Good workaround, but would like to not have multiple separate forms if I can avoid it.
